question: What model code is engraved on the frame of the micrometer shown in the close-up shots? A. 25 B. 1 millimeter C. NO.230M D. Part 3
Which part number of the instructional series is displayed in the main title text?
What is the primary color of the micrometer body shown in the video? A. Silver B. Brass C. Yellow D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A title card displays "How to Read a Metric Micrometer" with a Starrett logo. Hands hold a silver micrometer around a brass cylindrical fitting to measure diameter. A yellow bottle dispenses clear liquid onto a metal rod tip while fingers hold it steady. A hand rotates the knurled thimble clockwise, changing the measurement reading on the sleeve. Pink highlights indicate specific millimeter graduations on the scale alongside instructional text.

question: How many numbered markings are visible on the micrometer sleeve when the pink highlight is shown?

Which of the previously seen visual indicators is highlighting the micrometer scale? A. Red number indicator on the sleeve B. Pink rectangular highlight bar C. Human hand gripping the thimble D. Text overlay about thimble graduations

Did the video show BOTH a brass fitting being measured AND the micrometer scale reaching 35? A. Only a brass fitting was measured B. Only the micrometer scale reached 35 C. Both a brass fitting was measured and the micrometer scale reached 35 D. Neither occurred
Where is the Starrett brand logo positioned on the screen in the segment showing the hands holding the micrometer and brass fitting? A. center B. bottom right C. top D. background
Where is the instructional text overlay located during the scale reading explanation? A. background B. center C. top D. bottom right
What action is being performed with the tool in this segment? A. Using micrometer B. Measuring micrometer C. Reading micrometer
Describe the sequence of actions performed with the micrometer and the metal objects shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, hands position micrometer jaws around a brass fitting; at 8s, a yellow bottle dispenses liquid onto a metal rod; at 12s, fingers rotate the knurled thimble to adjust the scale; at 18s, a pink highlight appears on the sleeve to indicate millimeter graduations.

A technical diagram displays a target dimension specification. What measurement result will be verified when the actual object is measured?
canonical_answer: The small translucent cylindrical object is measured and confirmed to match the 15.25mm specification within ±.05mm tolerance.
